Example: Coach Tip: Bandeja keeps the ball low after the bounce.

Meaning: Advanced overhead shot with side spin
Example: Coach Tip: Vibora pushes the opponent toward the glass.
Coach Tip: Use smash to finish the point when the lob is short.

Meaning: Shot played into or from the corner area
Example: Coach Tip: Use angles to make the return difficult.

Meaning: Soft tactical shot to take control of the net
Example: Coach Tip: Use chiquita to force a weak reply.

Meaning: Advanced shot using the back wall
Example: Coach Tip: Let the ball rebound and prepare early.
Coach Tip: At golden point, the receiving team chooses the side.

Meaning: Defensive response against an overhead attack
Example: Coach Tip: Stay ready for the rebound after the smash.

Meaning: Defensive or control shot in difficult situations
Example: Coach Tip: Use parada to slow the point and recover position.
